hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.adb|*.ads) over=$(awk 'length>120{print NR}' "$f" | paste -sd, -); [ -n "$over" ] && printf '{"systemMessage":"%s has line(s) over 120 cols (gnatyM120): %s"}' "$f" "$over";; esac 2>/dev/null || true
